ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the framework used in the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_framework_id FOREIGN KEY ("framework_id") REFERENCES frameworks ("framework_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compilation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compilation status entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for compilation */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being compiled */,
  "implicit" INTEGER /* Implicit compilation flag */,
  "reference" INTEGER /* Reference compilation flag */,
  "compiled" INTEGER /* Compiled flag */,
  "compiled_pch" INTEGER /* Compiled PCH flag */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Explicit compilation flag */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Shared compilation flag */,
  "config_final" INTEGER /* Final configuration flag */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compilation started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compilation ended */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the compilation status */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler used */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during compilation */,
  "warning_count" INTEGER /* Number of warnings encountered during compilation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compilation_status_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compilation_status_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "include_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each include path entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "include_path" TEXT /* Include path for the configuration */,
  "framework_include_path" TEXT /* Framework include path for the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the include path was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the include path was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the include path */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the include path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_include_paths_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_include_paths_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_include_paths_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frameworks" (
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each framework */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the framework */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the framework */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
